'''Grandfather's Shoulder''' was a white-tipped active volcano on the [[Korunnal Highland]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]], near the capital city of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]]. Its snowmelt fed the [[Grandmother's Tears]] river. The tallest mountain on the Highland, it had dozens of active calderas.<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
